cannot_bind_port: Cannot bind port {port}, please ensure it is not occupied
preview_started:
Preview service started: {url}
Service will stop after closing this dialog.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete {filename}?
html_only_preview: Only HTML files can be previewed
empty_file_preview: File content is empty, cannot preview
pyinstaller_not_installed: PyInstaller not installed. Run: pip install pyinstaller
apk_guide:
To package HTML/Web app into APK:

1. PWA Builder (https://www.pwabuilder.com/)
2. Bubblewrap: npm install -g @bubblewrap/cli
3. Capacitor: https://capacitorjs.com/docs/android
ipa_guide:
To package Web app into IPA, macOS + Xcode required:

1. Create iOS project with Capacitor
2. Put HTML files into www folder
3. Archive in Xcode

Guide: https://capacitorjs.com/docs/ios
